name: part_003
file: tmp_【3D BIRTHDAY LIVE】 Lovin' you to the point I'm 𝓒𝓡𝓐𝓩𝓨 ♡ #KoishiteruZOMBIE  【Kureiji Ollie】 [eYLNO0v7ylg]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_003.webm

scenes.description: Kureiji Ollie and Hakos Baelz perform a 3D live cover of 'Shinunoga E-Wa' by Fujii Kaze.
Kureiji Ollie and Pavolia Reine perform a 3D live cover of 'Cute na Kanojo' by syudou.

subtitles.original:
キュートなカノジョ
Lyrics, Music: syudou
subtitles.english:
Cute na Kanojo
Lyrics, Music: syudou

subtitles.original: ねえ アナタには見えない事ばかり
subtitles.english: Hey, it's all things you can't see

subtitles.original: アタシは見えている事 知らないの？
subtitles.english: Don't you know that I can see them?

subtitles.original: 背中につけられた 誰かのキスの跡
subtitles.english: The trace of a kiss someone left on your back

subtitles.original: 一人じゃ買う訳の無い それも
subtitles.english: Even that, which you'd never buy alone

subtitles.original: 見て見ぬ振りなだけじゃねえ
subtitles.english: I'm not just pretending not to see it

subtitles.original: 笑っちまう程にキュートなカノジョ
subtitles.english: A girl so cute it makes me laugh

subtitles.original: 容姿端麗 狂気乱痴気
subtitles.english: Beautiful features, madness and revelry

subtitles.original: 怒鳴ってたって目が合って一撃
subtitles.english: Even if I shout, once our eyes meet, it's one strike

subtitles.original: 洗脳完了お上手
subtitles.english: Brainwashing complete, well done

subtitles.original: 愛していんのさ
subtitles.english: I'm in love with you

subtitles.original: 強く愛していんのさ
subtitles.english: I'm strongly in love with you

subtitles.original: ねえ 精神から全身まで 表面から内面まで
subtitles.english: Hey, from spirit to whole body, from surface to inside

subtitles.original: 脳天から先端まで 知りたいの
subtitles.english: From the crown of your head to your fingertips, I want to know it all

subtitles.original: それから 最近聞いた音楽から 散財した総額まで
subtitles.english: And then, from the music you heard recently to the total amount you squandered

subtitles.original: 完全把握しないと気が済まんのよ
subtitles.english: I won't be satisfied unless I grasp it all completely

subtitles.original: とやかく言ったって実際の問題
subtitles.english: Whatever you say, the actual problem is

subtitles.original: その眼中アタシ何割くらい担ってるか
subtitles.english: How much of your field of vision do I occupy?

subtitles.original: 隠してないで確信を頂戴
subtitles.english: Don't hide it, give me the certainty

subtitles.original: されど黙して語らず
subtitles.english: But you remain silent and say nothing

subtitles.original: 笑っちまう程にキュートなカノジョ
subtitles.english: A girl so cute it makes me laugh

subtitles.original: 容姿端麗 耽美甘美
subtitles.english: Beautiful features, aesthetic and sweet

subtitles.original: 身勝手だってシックな素振り
subtitles.english: Even being selfish, you have a chic manner

subtitles.original: 瞬時酩酊女冥利
subtitles.english: Instant intoxication, the privilege of being a woman

subtitles.original: 愛しちまうのさ
subtitles.english: I end up loving you

subtitles.original: されど愛しちまうのさ
subtitles.english: But I still end up loving you

subtitles.original: 過去を喰らう程にポップなエレジー
subtitles.english: A pop elegy that devours the past

subtitles.original: 排気口から香るラーメン
subtitles.english: Ramen smelling from the exhaust vent

subtitles.original: 騙し奪われる恋でもいいの
subtitles.english: Even a love where I'm deceived and robbed is fine

subtitles.original: だってこのアタシは
subtitles.english: Because I am

subtitles.original: めちゃくちゃ可愛いでしょ？
subtitles.english: Incredibly cute, aren't I?
